page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-48xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server powered by Intel Xeon 8559C processors. It features 192 vCPUs across 96 physical cores with a base clock speed of 3.6 GHz. The architecture is x86_64 and includes advanced instruction sets such as Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes 120,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-throughput and low-latency data access. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs on this instance.

In benchmark testing, the i7ie.metal-48xl demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth, placing in the top 10% of tested instances. It achieves top-tier results in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput. Single-core performance is moderate, aligning with the middle 50% of benchmarks. The hardware also shows strong capabilities in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation for medium and large models.

Given its massive local storage capacity and high memory density, this bare-metal instance offers high resource density for data-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data warehousing, and high-throughput analytical processing.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-48xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server designed for data-intensive workloads. It features 192 vCPUs on Intel Xeon 8559C processors with x86_64 architecture, 1536.0 GB of DDR5 memory, and 120,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating with a 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, this instance does not include GPUs. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and superior database operation speeds, though single-core performance remains average. The hardware is optimized for high-density storage and memory-heavy applications, making it highly suitable for large-scale databases, Redis deployments, and data warehousing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-48xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server featuring 192 vCPUs, 1536 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 120,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-48xl is a bare-metal server with 192 vCPUs, 1.5 TB DDR5 RAM, and 120 TB NVMe SSD storage for intensive database workloads.
tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform combining massive NVMe storage, high-speed DDR5 memory, and top-tier multi-core processing for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 192 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8559C processors with AMX and AVX-512 support
1536 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz
120,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for low-latency data access
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmark performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis caching, and data warehousing
